title: ElecKeys Cordless Vacuum Cleaner,65 Mins 580W 48KPa 1.8L Vacuum Cleaners for Home,Self-Standing Anti-Tangle Vacuum,Handheld Vacuum Cleaner Rechargeable Wall-Mounted for Carpets Floors Pet Hair
features: 🌀【580W Brushless Motor & 48KPA Powerful Suction】ElecKeys cordless vacuum cleaner features a 580W brushless motor delivering 48KPA hurricane-grade suction, instantly extracting deeply embedded pet hair, cookie crumbs from sofas and carpets, and micro-dust from floor gaps. Compared to traditional motors, this vacuum cleaner significantly enhances cleaning efficiency with near-zero loss design, extending the handheld vacuum cleaner's lifespan by 3 times. ElecKeys stick cordless vacuum cleaner operates below 65 dB, achieving perfect balance between power and quiet operation.

🌞【65-Minute Runtime & Rechargeable Battery】Equipped with 7×2200mAh Li-ion batteries, hand held vacuum cordless provides 65 minutes of continuous runtime. A single charge (4 hours) cleans up to 2500 sq.ft. With spare batteries, this vacuum cleaners for home extends operation to 130 minutes, effortlessly handling large spaces. ElecKeys vacuum supports independent battery charging and wall-mounted storage. cordless vacuum instant-swap battery design ensures zero waiting time during cleaning while saving storage space.

🧭【Versatile Tool Set & 1.8L Touch-Free Dustbin】The 1.8L extra-large dustbin stores two weeks' dust accumulation. With one-touch ejection, ElecKeys vacuum cleaners for home enables zero-contact dust disposal. Includes dual-brush cleaning tool to avoid dirt contact. ElecKeys upright vacuum cleaners comes with 1m extendable hose and 3 specialized nozzles, easily reaching ceilings, curtains, under sofas, and car interiors . Tips: For easy care, your handheld vacuum's brush heads and dustbin are washable.After cleaning, simply air dry your pet vacuum cleaner thoroughly before storing it.

🔄【Tangle-Free Roller Brush & 7-Stage Filtration】ElecKeys hand vacuum cleaner cordless features an anti-tangle V-brush with 4 green LED lights to reveal hidden pet hair and micro-dust. Combined with 7-stage precision filtration (Cyclones Trap Debris, Layer by Layer), this vacuum cleaner cordless powerful captures 99.9% of micro-particles down to 0.3 microns, emitting purified air to protect family respiratory health.

🔧【Self-Standing Design & LED Display】Using gravity balance technology, ElecKeys vacuum cleaner cordless stands firmly on any surface without support. Perfect for sudden interruptions (like doorbells) without bending over - ideal for users with back problems, seniors, and parents holding babies. The smart LED display on this vacuum cleaners shows real-time battery, mode, and blockage status. ElecKeys handheld vacuum cleaner cordless toggles between 3 modes with physical buttons.Note:In Hard Floor mode, this hand held vacuum runs a 3-second cleaning cycle after power-off. This final sip clears debris and is not mode switching.

✨【2-Year Warranty & Lifetime Support】ElecKeys stick vacuum cleaner cordless provides full protection with a 24-month whole-machine warranty and lifetime support. Get real-person assistance for your upright vacuum cleaner with operational guidance malfunction diagnosis or replacement parts ensuring complete peace of mind.
